config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society is important, but individual rights should not be treated as disposable whenever the majority thinks it is convenient. In my view, the role of society is to protect people and create fair rules, not to crush personal freedom or excuse abuse in the name of the common good. A healthy society is strongest when it respects both collective needs and the dignity of each person.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu di atas hak individu, karena dari perspektif saya di Amerika Serikat, hak individu justru menjadi batas penting agar mayoritas tidak sewenang-wenang. Masyarakat memang perlu aturan bersama, tetapi jika hak pribadi bisa dikesampingkan terlalu mudah, itu membuka jalan bagi penyalahgunaan kekuasaan atas nama “kebaikan bersama.” Bagi saya, prioritas yang lebih tepat adalah menyeimbangkan keduanya, dengan hak dasar individu tetap dilindungi secara kuat kecuali ada alasan yang sangat jelas dan terbatas. Tanpa perlindungan itu, “kepentingan masyarakat” bisa berubah menjadi alasan untuk menekan kebebasan dan martabat orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I disagree that society should take priority over the rights of the individual as a general rule. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand why people emphasize harmony, public order, and the common good, but I have also seen how easily that language can be used to silence criticism, excuse corruption, or pressure people to stay quiet. Society is not truly healthy if it asks individuals to surrender basic dignity and freedom whenever it is convenient for those in power. For me, the better principle is that collective interests matter, but they must be pursued within firm limits that protect individual rights.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena di Amerika Serikat saya melihat hak individu sebagai pagar utama terhadap tirani mayoritas dan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi kalau selalu ditempatkan di atas hak dasar, alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” bisa dipakai untuk membungkam kritik, membatasi kebebasan, atau mengorbankan kelompok yang tidak populer. Yang lebih masuk akal bagi saya adalah menyeimbangkan keduanya, dengan hak-hak dasar tetap menjadi batas yang tidak mudah dilanggar. Tanpa batas itu, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi alat bagi pihak yang berkuasa.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the idea that society should normally come before the rights of the individual. From my Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of harmony and public order, but in practice those words are often used to pressure people into silence or to protect power, not the common good. Society is not truly serving itself if it can override basic dignity, freedom of speech, or fairness whenever that is convenient. Collective interests matter, but they should be limited by strong individual rights, otherwise “the public interest” becomes an excuse for abuse.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum; bagi saya, kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Dari perspektif saya di Amerika Serikat, pelajaran paling penting justru bahwa mayoritas bisa salah, dan hak dasar ada untuk mencegah tirani atas nama “kebaikan bersama.” Saya juga paham argumen tentang harmoni dan ketertiban, tetapi dalam praktiknya alasan itu terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membungkam kritik atau menekan kelompok yang tidak populer. Jadi, saya lebih memilih keseimbangan yang tegas: kepentingan publik penting, tetapi hak individu harus tetap menjadi batas yang kuat dan tidak mudah dilanggar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
